name: BP p.l.c.
description: BP p.l.c. is a global energy company operating in Europe, the Americas, the Asia Pacific, and Africa. The company operates through three segments: Gas & Low Carbon Energy, Customers & Products, and Oil Production & Operations. It is involved in the production of oil and natural gas, refining, marketing, and distribution of petroleum products, as well as investing in low-carbon energy solutions, including wind, solar, and hydrogen power.
